title: Phase 1 — Foundation: LinkML + Pydantic infrastructure
description: Add LinkML and Pydantic infrastructure without changing schema or behavior. Add linkml, linkml-runtime, pydantic>=2.0; create statesim/schema/linkml/statesim_schema.yaml matching current BEFORE state; run gen-pydantic to produce statesim/schema/models.py; add tests/test_linkml_schema.py; ensure all 52 existing test modules pass.

title: Phase 2 — DDL consolidation
description: Eliminate dual DDL for jobs/job_templates. Update LinkML schema for jobs/job_templates; regenerate Pydantic; add test_ddl_single_source.py; make job_manager.py use DDL from statesim.schema.tables; add domain invariant docs to DATA_DICTIONARY.

title: Phase 3 — Timestamp + naming normalization
description: Rename sectors.created_date/last_updated_date -> created_at/updated_at; people.firm_partition -> partition; add wage_reductions.updated_at; fix demographic_reports.created_at; add migrations; update job templates and conftest.

title: Phase 4 — Sector column cleanup
description: Rename deliveries.product_type -> sector_id; drop consumer_decisions.good_type and inbound_stockpile.name; update DDL, migrations, job templates (create-consumer-orders, fulfill-consumer-orders, generate-consumer-decisions, generate-warehouses), analytics.

title: Phase 5 — People sector consolidation
description: Merge people.economic_sector and people.employment_sector into people.employment_sector_id (FK to sectors); update DDL, migration (name->UUID lookup), job templates (populate-workforce-members, assign-person-demographics).

title: Phase 6 — Workforce type alignment
description: firm_workforce columns REAL->INTEGER; jobs_filled_* -> workers_filled_*; workforce_requirements NOT NULL defaults; layoffs.sector_id NOT NULL + FK; DDL, migrations, job templates.

title: Phase 7 — Global settings key migration + game_id cleanup
description: Migrate sector-scoped settings keys from name-based to UUID-based; remove game_id=0 magic; update global_settings.json, init_workspace.py, execute-supply-contracts/template.sql, settings consumers.

title: Phase 8 — Final validation + documentation
description: Schema assertion test matching DATA_DICTIONARY_AFTER; update DATA_DICTIONARY to AFTER; AGENTS.md paths; API_CONTRACT.md; final LinkML + Pydantic; full test suite (Python + Electron e2e).

title: Cleanup checkpoint (after Phase 6 — workforce type alignment)
description: Evaluate project overall state (tests, lint, docs) and apply limited incremental refactoring where appropriate.

title: Cleanup checkpoint (after Phase 7 — global settings + game_id)
description: Evaluate project overall state (tests, lint, docs) and apply limited incremental refactoring where appropriate.

title: Cleanup checkpoint (after Phase 5 — people sector consolidation)
description: Evaluate project overall state (tests, lint, docs) and apply limited incremental refactoring where appropriate.

title: Cleanup checkpoint (after Phase 3 — timestamp + naming)
description: Evaluate project overall state (tests, lint, docs) and apply limited incremental refactoring where appropriate.
